012 * distributed under the License is distributed on an "AS IS" BASIS,

015 * limitations under the License.
016 */
017package org.apache.juneau.http.header;
018
019import java.util.function.*;
020
021import org.apache.juneau.commons.http.*;
022
023/**
024 * Represents an HTTP <c>Content-Type</c> header.
025 *
026 * @since 9.2.1
027 */
028public class ContentType extends HttpMediaTypeHeader {
029
030   public static final String NAME = "Content-Type";
031
032   // application/*
033   /** Content-Type for {@code application/atom+xml}. */
034   public static final ContentType APPLICATION_ATOM_XML = new ContentType("application/atom+xml");
035   /** Content-Type for {@code application/bson} (Juneau {@code BsonSerializer}/{@code BsonParser}). */
036   public static final ContentType APPLICATION_BSON = new ContentType("application/bson");
037   /** Content-Type for {@code application/cbor} (Juneau {@code CborSerializer}/{@code CborParser}). */
038   public static final ContentType APPLICATION_CBOR = new ContentType("application/cbor");
039   /** Content-Type for {@code application/x-www-form-urlencoded}. */
040   public static final ContentType APPLICATION_FORM_URLENCODED = new ContentType("application/x-www-form-urlencoded");
041   /** Content-Type for {@code application/gzip}. */
042   public static final ContentType APPLICATION_GZIP = new ContentType("application/gzip");
043   /** Content-Type for {@code application/hal+json} (HAL hypermedia). */
044   public static final ContentType APPLICATION_HAL_JSON = new ContentType("application/hal+json");
045   /** Content-Type for {@code application/hjson} (Juneau {@code HjsonSerializer}/{@code HjsonParser}). */
046   public static final ContentType APPLICATION_HJSON = new ContentType("application/hjson");
047   /** Content-Type for {@code application/hocon} (Juneau {@code HoconSerializer}/{@code HoconParser}). */
048   public static final ContentType APPLICATION_HOCON = new ContentType("application/hocon");
049   /** Content-Type for {@code application/javascript}. */
050   public static final ContentType APPLICATION_JAVASCRIPT = new ContentType("application/javascript");
051   /** Content-Type for {@code application/jcs+json} (Juneau {@code JcsSerializer}). */
052   public static final ContentType APPLICATION_JCS_JSON = new ContentType("application/jcs+json");
053   /** Content-Type for {@code application/json}. */
054   public static final ContentType APPLICATION_JSON = new ContentType("application/json");
055   /** Content-Type for {@code application/json5} (Juneau {@code Json5Serializer}/{@code Json5Parser}). */
056   public static final ContentType APPLICATION_JSON5 = new ContentType("application/json5");
057   /** Content-Type for {@code application/json5l} (Juneau {@code Json5lSerializer}/{@code Json5lParser}). */
058   public static final ContentType APPLICATION_JSON5L = new ContentType("application/json5l");
059   /** Content-Type for {@code application/jsonl} (Juneau {@code JsonlSerializer}/{@code JsonlParser}). */
060   public static final ContentType APPLICATION_JSONL = new ContentType("application/jsonl");
061   /** Content-Type for {@code application/json-patch+json} (RFC 6902). */
062   public static final ContentType APPLICATION_JSON_PATCH = new ContentType("application/json-patch+json");
063   /** Content-Type for {@code application/ld+json} (JSON-LD). */
064   public static final ContentType APPLICATION_LD_JSON = new ContentType("application/ld+json");
065   /** Content-Type for {@code application/manifest+json} (W3C web app manifest). */
066   public static final ContentType APPLICATION_MANIFEST_JSON = new ContentType("application/manifest+json");
067   /** Content-Type for {@code application/merge-patch+json} (RFC 7396). */
068   public static final ContentType APPLICATION_MERGE_PATCH = new ContentType("application/merge-patch+json");
069   /** Content-Type for {@code application/msgpack} (RFC-style MessagePack). */
070   public static final ContentType APPLICATION_MSGPACK = new ContentType("application/msgpack");
071   /** Content-Type for {@code application/n-quads} (RDF N-Quads). */
072   public static final ContentType APPLICATION_N_QUADS = new ContentType("application/n-quads");
073   /** Content-Type for {@code application/x-ndjson} (newline-delimited JSON; alias for JSONL). */
074   public static final ContentType APPLICATION_NDJSON = new ContentType("application/x-ndjson");
075   /** Content-Type for {@code application/octet-stream}. */
076   public static final ContentType APPLICATION_OCTET_STREAM = new ContentType("application/octet-stream");
077   /** Content-Type for {@code application/vnd.apache.parquet} (Juneau {@code ParquetSerializer}/{@code ParquetParser}). */
078   public static final ContentType APPLICATION_PARQUET = new ContentType("application/vnd.apache.parquet");
079   /** Content-Type for {@code application/pdf}. */
080   public static final ContentType APPLICATION_PDF = new ContentType("application/pdf");
081   /** Content-Type for {@code application/problem+json} (RFC 7807 problem details). */
082   public static final ContentType APPLICATION_PROBLEM_JSON = new ContentType("application/problem+json");
083   /** Content-Type for {@code application/problem+xml} (RFC 7807 problem details). */
084   public static final ContentType APPLICATION_PROBLEM_XML = new ContentType("application/problem+xml");
085   /** Content-Type for {@code application/vnd.apache.protobuf} (Juneau {@code RdfProtoSerializer}/{@code RdfProtoParser}). */
086   public static final ContentType APPLICATION_PROTOBUF_BINARY = new ContentType("application/vnd.apache.protobuf");
087   /** Content-Type for {@code application/rdf+json}. */
088   public static final ContentType APPLICATION_RDF_JSON = new ContentType("application/rdf+json");
089   /** Content-Type for {@code application/soap+xml}. */
090   public static final ContentType APPLICATION_SOAP_XML = new ContentType("application/soap+xml");
091   /** Content-Type for {@code application/svg+xml}. */
092   public static final ContentType APPLICATION_SVG_XML = new ContentType("application/svg+xml");
093   /** Content-Type for {@code application/vnd.apache.thrift.binary} (Juneau {@code RdfThriftSerializer}/{@code RdfThriftParser}). */
094   public static final ContentType APPLICATION_THRIFT_BINARY = new ContentType("application/vnd.apache.thrift.binary");
095   /** Content-Type for {@code application/toml} (Juneau {@code TomlSerializer}/{@code TomlParser}). */
096   public static final ContentType APPLICATION_TOML = new ContentType("application/toml");
097   /** Content-Type for {@code application/trig} (RDF TriG). */
098   public static final ContentType APPLICATION_TRIG = new ContentType("application/trig");
099   /** Content-Type for {@code application/trix+xml} (RDF TriX). */
100   public static final ContentType APPLICATION_TRIX_XML = new ContentType("application/trix+xml");
101   /** Content-Type for {@code application/vnd.api+json} (JSON:API). */
102   public static final ContentType APPLICATION_VND_API_JSON = new ContentType("application/vnd.api+json");
103   /** Content-Type for {@code application/wasm} (WebAssembly). */
104   public static final ContentType APPLICATION_WASM = new ContentType("application/wasm");
105   /** Content-Type for {@code application/xhtml+xml}. */
106   public static final ContentType APPLICATION_XHTML_XML = new ContentType("application/xhtml+xml");
107   /** Content-Type for {@code application/xml}. */
108   public static final ContentType APPLICATION_XML = new ContentType("application/xml");
109   /** Content-Type for {@code application/yaml} (Juneau {@code YamlSerializer}/{@code YamlParser}). */
110   public static final ContentType APPLICATION_YAML = new ContentType("application/yaml");
111   /** Content-Type for {@code application/zip}. */
112   public static final ContentType APPLICATION_ZIP = new ContentType("application/zip");
113
114   // image/*
115   /** Content-Type for {@code image/avif}. */
116   public static final ContentType IMAGE_AVIF = new ContentType("image/avif");
117   /** Content-Type for {@code image/bmp}. */
118   public static final ContentType IMAGE_BMP = new ContentType("image/bmp");
119   /** Content-Type for {@code image/gif}. */
120   public static final ContentType IMAGE_GIF = new ContentType("image/gif");
121   /** Content-Type for {@code image/heic}. */
122   public static final ContentType IMAGE_HEIC = new ContentType("image/heic");
123   /** Content-Type for {@code image/heif}. */
124   public static final ContentType IMAGE_HEIF = new ContentType("image/heif");
125   /** Content-Type for {@code image/x-icon} (favicons). */
126   public static final ContentType IMAGE_ICON = new ContentType("image/x-icon");
127   /** Content-Type for {@code image/jpeg}. */
128   public static final ContentType IMAGE_JPEG = new ContentType("image/jpeg");
129   /** Content-Type for {@code image/png}. */
130   public static final ContentType IMAGE_PNG = new ContentType("image/png");
131   /** Content-Type for {@code image/svg+xml}. */
132   public static final ContentType IMAGE_SVG = new ContentType("image/svg+xml");
133   /** Content-Type for {@code image/tiff}. */
134   public static final ContentType IMAGE_TIFF = new ContentType("image/tiff");
135   /** Content-Type for {@code image/webp}. */
136   public static final ContentType IMAGE_WEBP = new ContentType("image/webp");
137
138   // multipart/*
139   /** Content-Type for {@code multipart/alternative} (RFC 2046). */
140   public static final ContentType MULTIPART_ALTERNATIVE = new ContentType("multipart/alternative");
141   /** Content-Type for {@code multipart/byteranges} (RFC 7233). */
142   public static final ContentType MULTIPART_BYTERANGES = new ContentType("multipart/byteranges");
143   /** Content-Type for {@code multipart/form-data}. */
144   public static final ContentType MULTIPART_FORM_DATA = new ContentType("multipart/form-data");
145   /** Content-Type for {@code multipart/mixed} (RFC 2046). */
146   public static final ContentType MULTIPART_MIXED = new ContentType("multipart/mixed");
147   /** Content-Type for {@code multipart/related} (RFC 2387). */
148   public static final ContentType MULTIPART_RELATED = new ContentType("multipart/related");
149
150   // text/*
151   /** Content-Type for {@code text/calendar} (iCalendar). */
152   public static final ContentType TEXT_CALENDAR = new ContentType("text/calendar");
153   /** Content-Type for {@code text/css}. */
154   public static final ContentType TEXT_CSS = new ContentType("text/css");
155   /** Content-Type for {@code text/csv} (Juneau {@code CsvSerializer}/{@code CsvParser}). */
156   public static final ContentType TEXT_CSV = new ContentType("text/csv");
157   /** Content-Type for {@code text/event-stream} (Server-Sent Events). */
158   public static final ContentType TEXT_EVENT_STREAM = new ContentType("text/event-stream");
159   /** Content-Type for {@code text/html}. */
160   public static final ContentType TEXT_HTML = new ContentType("text/html");
161   /** Content-Type for {@code text/html+stripped} (Juneau {@code HtmlStrippedDocSerializer}). */
162   public static final ContentType TEXT_HTML_STRIPPED = new ContentType("text/html+stripped");
163   /** Content-Type for {@code text/ini} (Juneau {@code IniSerializer}/{@code IniParser}). */
164   public static final ContentType TEXT_INI = new ContentType("text/ini");
165   /** Content-Type for {@code text/javascript} (preferred per RFC 9239). */
166   public static final ContentType TEXT_JAVASCRIPT = new ContentType("text/javascript");
167   /** Content-Type for {@code text/json} (Juneau {@code JsonParser} alias). */
168   public static final ContentType TEXT_JSON = new ContentType("text/json");
169   /** Content-Type for {@code text/markdown} (Juneau {@code MarkdownSerializer}). */
170   public static final ContentType TEXT_MARKDOWN = new ContentType("text/markdown");
171   /** Content-Type for {@code text/n3} (RDF N3). */
172   public static final ContentType TEXT_N3 = new ContentType("text/n3");
173   /** Content-Type for {@code text/n-triple} (RDF N-Triples). */
174   public static final ContentType TEXT_N_TRIPLE = new ContentType("text/n-triple");
175   /** Content-Type for {@code text/openapi}. */
176   public static final ContentType TEXT_OPENAPI = new ContentType("text/openapi");
177   /** Content-Type for {@code text/plain}. */
178   public static final ContentType TEXT_PLAIN = new ContentType("text/plain");
179   /** Content-Type for {@code text/protobuf} (Juneau {@code PrototextSerializer}/{@code PrototextParser}). */
180   public static final ContentType TEXT_PROTOBUF = new ContentType("text/protobuf");
181   /** Content-Type for {@code text/turtle} (RDF Turtle). */
182   public static final ContentType TEXT_TURTLE = new ContentType("text/turtle");
183   /** Content-Type for {@code text/uon} (Juneau {@code UonSerializer}/{@code UonParser}). */
184   public static final ContentType TEXT_UON = new ContentType("text/uon");
185   /** Content-Type for {@code text/xml}. */
186   public static final ContentType TEXT_XML = new ContentType("text/xml");
187   /** Content-Type for {@code text/xml+rdf} (RDF/XML). */
188   public static final ContentType TEXT_XML_RDF = new ContentType("text/xml+rdf");
189   /** Content-Type for {@code text/yaml} (Juneau {@code YamlParser} alias). */
190   public static final ContentType TEXT_YAML = new ContentType("text/yaml");
191
192   // Special
193   /** Content-Type for <c>*&#47;*</c> (all media types). */
194   public static final ContentType WILDCARD = new ContentType("*/*");
195   /** Reusable {@code Content-Type} header with a {@code null} value. */
196   public static final ContentType NULL = new ContentType((String)null);
197
198   public ContentType(String value) {
199      super(NAME, value);
200   }
201
202   public ContentType(MediaType value) {
203      super(NAME, value);
204   }
205
206   private ContentType(Supplier<?> supplier, int lazyMode) {
207      super(NAME, supplier, lazyMode);
208   }
209
210   public static ContentType of(String value) {
211      return new ContentType(value);
212   }
213
214   public static ContentType of(MediaType value) {
215      return new ContentType(value);
216   }
217
218   public static ContentType ofLazyWire(Supplier<String> supplier) {
219      return new ContentType(supplier, LAZY_WIRE_STRING);
220   }
221
222   public static ContentType ofLazyParsed(Supplier<MediaType> supplier) {
223      return new ContentType(supplier, LAZY_MEDIA_TYPE);
224   }
225}
